goal: Founder-requested profile/referral fixes: guest sign-in CTA, history Read-Again deep-link, welcome-back popup spam, copy-code button, redeem popups.
done: (REQ-1) profile.js renderIdentity now renders a 'Continue with Google' button in the guest-reader header (was only in the Settings→Account card); css/profile.css .profile-header__signin. (BUG-3) profile.js history 'Read Again' now deep-links to the rendered RESULT via serializeReadingStateToUrl({mode,spread,topic,lang,cards}) → /reading.html?m&s&t&c&l (was getModeHref → the entry/board page); cards rebuilt from reading_cards (base id + orientation), falls back to the board page only when an entry has no cards. (BUG-2) login-reward.js showWelcomeToast now gated by a per-calendar-day localStorage flag meowtarot_welcomeback_date — Supabase re-fires SIGNED_IN with no in-memory prevUser on each page load, which re-popped 'Welcome back' on every homepage visit. (REQ-8) referral.js: added a 'Copy code' button (#mt-ref-copy-code) beside the existing Share-link button, copies the raw code with Copied! feedback; css/styles.css codebox now flex-wraps so two buttons + code don't crowd on mobile. (REQ-10) referral.js redeem now fires a self-contained top-centre toast (.mt-ref-toast, green/red) on success AND failure, in addition to the inline message.
verified: node --check on all 3 JS. Headless 390px /profile.html guest state: 'Sign in with Google' button renders in the identity header; achievements show 'Daily Reading today' (REQ-5 from batch A); no layout breakage. REQ-8/10 + BUG-2/3 are signed-in flows verified by code review (founder manual QA for the auth'd paths).
